SyncCollections.SyncSql: SELECT BusinessEntityID as Id, a.Name as Content FROM Sales.Store a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Store'),'20000101')

SELECT BusinessEntityID as Id, a.FirstName + coalesce(' ' + a.middlename,'')+coalesce(' ' + a.lastname,'')  as Content, a.PersonType FROM person.Person a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Person'),'20000101') order by a.ModifiedDate
SyncCollections.SyncSqlID: SELECT BusinessEntityID as Id, a.FirstName + coalesce(' ' + a.middlename,'')+coalesce(' ' + a.lastname,'')  as Content, a.PersonType FROM person.Person a order by Id offset 2000 rows fetch next 2000 rows only

SyncCollections.SyncSql: select a.ProductID as Id, a.Name as Content, a.Color, a.ProductNumber From Production.Product a WHERE a.ModifiedDate >= coalesce((select max(convert(date, LastSyncTime)) from Vector_SyncTracker where CollectionName='AW-Product'),'20000101')
